records.title: Admin export contract hardening
records.summary: A previous export PRD needed explicit downstream schema ownership, versioning, and rollback notes before release.
records.requirement_summary: Admin CSV export touches analytics and partner ingestion flows.
records.finding_excerpt: Dependency contract missing: downstream consumers could break on schema drift without versioning.

metadata.lesson: When exports cross team boundaries, capture contract owner, compatibility policy, and rollback path.

records.title: Privacy-sensitive workflow release gate
records.summary: A sensitive workflow required QA pass/fail criteria plus security sign-off because customer data moved across services.
records.requirement_summary: Profile sync feature replicated customer fields into an external service.
records.finding_excerpt: Security approval blocker: data handling and audit expectations were underspecified.

metadata.lesson: If customer data crosses boundaries, require auditability, ownership, and explicit release approval criteria.
